calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Robert Schoen, Esq., Legal Assistance to the Elderly, 415-757-4518 Specially Appearing for Defendant/Debtor Jwana Nicole Aguirre
No appearance is made for Assignee Collect Access LLC

Counsel specially appearing for Defendant/Debtor Jwana Nicole Aguirre indicates to the Court that a settlement agreement has been reached by parties.

Hearing held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is taken off calendar/Moot. Counsel specially appearing for Defendant/Debtor Jwana Nicole Aguirre indicates to the Court that a settlement agreement has been reached by parties.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly Barrientos, Esq. (626-588-1600) of Zee Law Group, P.c. for Plaintiff Assignee, Collect Access, LLC via Zoom.
Robert Schoen, Esq. (415-757-4518; rschoen@laesf.org) of Legal Assistance to the Elderly for and with Debtor, Jawana Nicole Aguirre.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION: The Judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Continued To Jul-08-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KIMBERLY BARRIENTOS, Esq. of Zee Law Group (Tel: 888-522-6509) for assignee Collect Access;
No other appearances made in this matter.

ASSIGNEE COLLECT ACCESS LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearance by or for the judgment debtor Jawna Nicole Aguirre.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues the matter to July 8, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 for the parties to attempt to discuss a possible resolution. Counsel for Collect Access is to provide notice to the judgment debtor of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
